Surf Shack Lineup - Surf Shack Platter: $50, Surf Shack Feast: $100, Surf Shack Tray: $75. Dive In: Click to learn more. Opens in a new window.
All You Can Eat LandShark Fish & Chips - $19.99 Every Friday - View Menu: Click to learn more. Opens in a new window.
Lunch starting at $11.99. Monday through Friday until 3pm. Click to view the participating locations
New items added to our menu. Click to learn more. Opens in a new window.
Margaritaville Atlanta Restaurant
Wyndham-Margaritaville Atlanta Centennial Park • 155 Centennial Olympic Park Drive • Atlanta, GA 30303
•
(470) 781-2336
SUNDAY - THURSDAY: 11:00AM - 10:00PM • FRIDAY & SATURDAY: 11:00AM - 12:00am
Serving up Gratitude
A taste of gratitude: 15% Off For our Heroes!*
Learn More
Try Our Featured Menu
Hand-picked flavors you don’t want to miss
Explore the Menu
Join Today and get Paradise Rewards
Learn More
Bring the Island Life Home with You
Shop Now
Enable Audio Description
Groups & Events
Every element of your tropical escape is complete… the only thing you need to do is bring your group.
Book Now
Join the Mailing List
And get all the latest Margaritaville updates!
Join Now

--- Page: /menu ---
Menu | Atlanta, GA | Margaritaville | Atlanta, GA | Jimmy Buffett's Margaritaville
Work in Paradise
- Join our team!
Check our current openings Here
Skip to content
Feed your carnivorous habit with our double stacked signature Cheeseburger in Paradise
Appetizer Trio includes caribbean chicken egg rolls, chicken tenders and buffalo chicken dip served with tortilla chips
Grilled Fish Tacos with rice and beans
Cajun Seafood Pasta with tender shrimp and scallops
Southern Fried Chicken Salad
Beach Club Sandwich with fries and a pickle
Menu
Download Lunch Specials Menu
Download Food Menu
Download Drinks Menu
Choose A Category
Featured Menu
Dinner Menu
Lunch Specials
Margaritas and Drinks
Kids Menu
Starters
Appetizer Trio
Caribbean chicken egg rolls, chicken tenders and
Buffalo chicken dip served with tortilla chips
Key West Chicken Quesadilla
Shredded chicken, melted Monterey Jack cheese stuffed
into a toasted flour tortilla. Served with sour cream, fire
roasted salsa, and guacamole
Fried Green Tomatoes
NEW
Fried golden, topped with chilled seafood salad,
and a drizzle of chili-spiked aioli
Cuban Flatbread
NEW
Shredded carnitas pork, sliced ham, melted
Swiss cheese, and pickles. Drizzled with
house-made mustard aioli
Corn Fritters
NEW
Our sweet and savory house-made fritters served with whipped honey butter
Volcano Nachos
Tortilla chips layered with chili, cheese,
pico de gallo, guacamole, sour cream and
jalapeños
Chicken Wings
Choice of: buffalo, jerk or teriyaki, served with
dipping sauce
Fried Pickles
Served with house-made ranch
Cajun Shrimp Dip
Creamy house-made dip, served with
grilled focaccia bread
Hand-Breaded Chicken Tenders
Served with your choice of house-made ranch or
honey mustard
Salads
Southern Fried Chicken Salad
Romaine lettuce, tomatoes, bacon, shredded
cheese, cabbage and green onions tossed in
our house-made ranch and topped with our
hand-breaded chicken tenders
Asian Chicken Salad
Romaine lettuce, shredded carrot, chopped peanuts,
shredded cabbage, green onions tossed in toasted
sesame dressing and topped with grilled chicken and
crispy wonton strips
Taco Salad
NEW
Romaine lettuce, taco meat, black beans,
tomatoes, avocado, mixed cheese, and pickled
jalapeños, tossed in house-made ranch dressing
and served in a crisp tortilla bowl
Island Greek
Iceberg lettuce, cucumbers, kalamata olives,
cherry tomatoes, red onion and green peppers tossed
in our traditional Greek dressing and topped with
pepperoncini peppers and feta cheese. Add chicken
Entrees
Add a side mixed green salad, a side Caesar salad to any entrée	for an additional cost
Seafood Combo (F&C, Coco Shrimp, Lava Shrimp)
A sampling of our LandShark® Fish & Chips,
Coconut Shrimp and Fried Shrimp. Served with
French fries and dipping sauces
LandShark Lager Fish & Chips
Hand-dipped in LandShark® batter and fried to a
golden brown. Served with jalapeño tartar
dipping sauce and French fries
Jerk Salmon
Brushed with a Caribbean glaze and served with
white rice and fresh sautéed spin

meta.meta_description: Get transported to paradise with tropical flavors at Margaritaville in Atlanta, GA! Dine in or bring the island home with delivery & takeout!
